div.pre: <mxGraphModel> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="RF Analysis Signal Chain" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="0" y="20" width="630" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="PCB Antenna <font style="font-size:9px">Unintentional</font>" style="shape=mxgraph.electrical.signal_sources.signal_transducer;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="100" width="50" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Trace Filter <font style="font-size:9px">Board Parasitics</font>" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="100" width="80" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Clock Driver <font style="font-size:9px">100 MHz</font>" style="shape=mxgraph.electrical.signal_sources.amplifier;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="100" width="80" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Coupling Path <font style="font-size:9px">Crosstalk/EMI</font>" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="390" y="100" width="80" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="EMI Detector <font style="font-size:9px">Spectrum Analysis</font>" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="510" y="100" width="80" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#333333;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" edge="1" source="3" target="4" /> <mxCell id="9" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#333333;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" edge="1" source="4" target="5" /> <mxCell id="10" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#333333;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" edge="1" source="5" target="6" /> <mxCell id="11" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#333333;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" edge="1" source="6" target="7" /> <mxCell id="12" value="Clock Source <font style="font-size:9px">100 MHz CMOS</font>" style="ellipse;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="260" width="60" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#9933FF;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" edge="1" source="12" target="5" /> <mxCell id="14" value="G: +0.0 dB NF: 0.0 dB" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="200" width="50" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="G: -1.5 dB NF: 1.5 dB" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="190" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" value="G: +4.5 dB NF: 4.5 dB" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="190" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" value="G: -15.5 dB NF: 5.0 dB" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="390" y="190" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" value="G: -15.5 dB NF: 5.0 dB" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="510" y="190" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
